headline: Essex Property to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: ESS reports Q1 2026 results on April 28, with revenues seen up 3.5% year over year, but core FFO per share may slip as West Coast demand steadies.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Essex Property Trust, Lowers Price Target to $262
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst James Feldman   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $268 to $262.
